_description: WT-06 heuristic fixture: workers' file-touches ARE disjoint (would otherwise be a fit case) but the project has a live dev server bound to its Dev Port Registry-assigned port. Worktree workers can't share the bound port, and the dev server's process-state divergence between worktrees would surface as runtime weirdness even when the disk-level changes are independent. The heuristic should emit verdict=anti-fit-warn even though disk-level signals look fit-positive — runtime state dominates.

antiFitReasons: port 5173 assigned to 'demo-app' is currently bound (live dev server)
Dev Port Registry assignment(s) for this project: 1

expectedSurfaceText: Anti-fit signals detected: port 5173 assigned to 'demo-app' is currently bound (live dev server); file watcher config(s) present: vite.config.ts; Dev Port Registry assignment(s) for this project: 1. Worktree mode may break runtime invariants. Continue anyway? (y/N)
